title: lib/join
description: The lib/join directory is responsible for handling the parsing and execution of join operations over a set of data sources. It collaborates with the Parser class to parse join expressions and the InputFormat class to perform the actual join operation. The architectural pattern used in this directory is the composite pattern, which allows for the creation of complex input formats by combining simpler ones. The directory achieves scalability and maintainability by separating the parsing and execution of join operations, making it easier to modify and extend the functionality as needed. The use of the composite pattern also improves the modularity and reusability of the code.
raw_response:
TITLE: lib/join

DESCRIPTION:
The lib/join directory is responsible for handling the parsing and execution of join operations over a set of data sources. It collaborates with the Parser class to parse join expressions and the InputFormat class to perform the actual join operation. The architectural pattern used in this directory is the composite pattern, which allows for the creation of complex input formats by combining simpler ones. The directory achieves scalability and maintainability by separating the parsing and execution of join operations, making it easier to modify and extend the functionality as needed. The use of the composite pattern also improves the modularity and reusability of the code.
